scripts.serve: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --only functions
scripts.deploy: firebase deploy --only functions && npm run set-public
scripts.set-public: gcloud run services add-iam-policy-binding getstartups --region=southamerica-east1 --member=allUsers --role=roles/run.invoker --project=mesclainvestluis && gcloud run services add-iam-policy-binding getstartupbyid --region=southamerica-east1 --member=allUsers --role=roles/run.invoker --project=mesclainvestluis && gcloud run services add-iam-policy-binding getstartupporestagio --region=southamerica-east1 --member=allUsers --role=roles/run.invoker --project=mesclainvestluis
